goals.title: AI Team goal-mode full architecture refactor for /Users/swcrbt/develo...
goals.objective: AI Team goal-mode full architecture refactor for /Users/swcrbt/develop/github/swcrbt/ai-team. Do not downgrade scope. Preserve business behavior and compatibility while replacing fake part-based boundaries with real Dart libraries, splitting core domain/model/orchestration/application/ui/test modules. Subgoals: G1 real Dart library boundaries; G2 core domain/model gateway; G3 orchestration service boundaries; G4 AppController facade with delegated components; G5 focused UI widgets/presenters; G6 tests/docs/final quality gate. Verification after each story, phase commits, final flutter analyze/test/build, git diff --check, clarity cleanup, code review, final commit, then mark aggregate Codex goal complete.
goals.blockedReason: The old G001 cannot be truthfully checkpointed under its mismatched objective. Superseding it with explicit ledger-repair work is narrower than manual state editing and keeps all original no-downgrade constraints intact.
goals.steeringEvidence: G001 kept an old objective-mismatch blocked flag while G002-G008 hold the aligned recovery evidence and commits. The previous CLI attempt lacked replacement children, so it only refreshed the blocked flag. This directive supplies an explicit replacement bookkeeping story.
goals.steeringRationale: Use the supported steering path to preserve G001 audit history and make the aligned recovery ledger schedulable without manual JSON editing.
goals.evidence: Status reconciliation: this legacy story was superseded by G009; raw status is closed so OMX/HUD no longer reports an active in-progress goal while preserving steeringStatus=superseded audit fields.

goals.title: Audit refactor baseline and blockers
goals.objective: Audit commits e2607d4 through a40d7fe and the current architecture against the original G1-G6 requirements; run baseline flutter analyze, flutter test, and git diff --check; record concrete blocker files and decide which remaining large modules must be refactored instead of accepted as residual risk.
goals.evidence: Baseline audit recorded in docs/architecture_recovery_audit.md. goals.title: Split remaining application responsibilities
goals.objective: Refactor lib/application/app_controller.dart so AppController remains the public facade but delegates configuration validation, conversation/session lifecycle, task queue operations, dispatch lifecycle, and title generation to focused application components with targeted tests under test/application.
goals.evidence: Split application responsibilities: added ConfigurationController, TaskQueueController, and shared state_lookup; AppController now delegates configuration validation/state mutation and queue mutation/title generation while preserving public API. AppController line count reduced from 1779 to 1217. Added component tests in test/application/controller_components_test.dart. Verified /Users/swcrbt/develop/flutter/bin/flutter test test/application and /Users/swcrbt/develop/flutter/bin/flutter analyze.

goals.title: Refine orchestration boundaries
goals.objective: Refactor remaining TeamOrchestrator responsibilities by extracting secretary summary, assignment recovery, member dispatch, command continuation, and audit/private dispatch policy where doing so reduces mixed workflow logic; preserve serial/parallel assignment, reassignment, private secretary dispatch, command continuation, diagnostics, and audit behavior with focused tests.
goals.evidence: Split orchestration subflows: added AssignmentRunner and SecretarySummaryRunner, exported focused orchestration modules, and replaced TeamOrchestrator private assignment retry/reassignment and summary methods with runner delegation. TeamOrchestrator reduced to 754 lines. Added assignment runner tests. Verified /Users/swcrbt/develop/flutter/bin/flutter test test/core/orchestration test/core/domain and /Users/swcrbt/develop/flutter/bin/flutter analyze.

goals.evidence: Split config dialogs into focused team/model/role/member/workspace modules with config_dialogs.dart retained as compatibility barrel; split app_widget_test.dart into focused UI workflow suites for chat surfaces, message rendering, scroll positions, streaming scroll, composer shortcuts, management dialogs, and orchestration flows. goals.title: Final gates and durable closeout
goals.objective: Run changed-file cleanup review, full flutter analyze, full flutter test, flutter build macos --debug, git diff --check, independent code review and architecture review; commit the final recovery work; only then complete the active Codex aggregate goal and checkpoint ultragoal with quality-gate evidence.
goals.evidence: Final independent review was non-clean. Architect lane returned WATCH because AppController and TeamOrchestrator still concentrate process coupling; code-reviewer lane returned COMMENT rather than APPROVE. Required ultragoal gate forbids completing on COMMENT/WATCH.

reviewBlockerResolution.evidence: G010 completed the blocker-resolution story with verification and independent APPROVE/CLEAR evidence; G008 remains historical review-blocked evidence rather than an active blocker.
